creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #7)

I'm not sure I understand your comment #5, "If I call it from another port, it does not work."

As for your comment #7, right, so that should be the same as the attached patch but with "docbook-xsl>0:textproc/docbook-xsl" in place of "xsltproc:textproc/libxslt" -- it's only really needed if both X11 and MANPAGES are enabled, so no need to bring in the dependency if only one of the two is specified.
